rulings.Case Title: CAPITAL ONE NA VS. MIKAIL ABROMOV et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Set Aside Settlement Agreement And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 27, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT ABRAMOV, MIKHAIL (SUED AS MIKAIL ABROMOV) Motion To Set Aside Settlement Agreement continued to 3/5/12. Plaintiff to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6b to provide courtesy copy of opposition to 501 by 2/27/12 at 4PM. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSEE FOR VS. MARVELLUS LUCAS et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 27, 2012, line 2. PLAINTIFF U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Deny. Moving party failed to shift burden i.e. failed to show named defendant in possession. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: THIRD AND MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC VS. DAVID ANTHONY DULIN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 27, 2012, line 4. DEFENDANT DAVID DULIN's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND Grant. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. REBECCA STUDDERT-KENNED et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 27, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANT REBECCA STUDDERT-KENNED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend complaint to show relevant provision of rental agreement. (501/REQ)
